_comment: Bundle size limits in bytes. CI fails if any artifact exceeds its max. Update the baseline when you've intentionally added weight (e.g., a new feature). See scripts/check-bundle-size.mjs.
_target: Raspberry Pi 4 kiosk — Cortex-A72 @ 1.5 GHz, Chromium. First-paint parse is the bottleneck (~1 MB/s JS). Keep total_js under ~1.5 MB for snappy cold boot; under 2.5 MB tolerable.
